task: Audit current deletion and request-record flows
acceptance_criteria: Request record joins, snapshot inputs, provider deletion, token deletion, and user deletion call sites are identified

task: Add request-record snapshot schema and write path
acceptance_criteria: New records persist provider/key/user/token/model display fields without relying on live associations
validation_command: perl -e 'alarm shift; exec @ARGV' 60 cargo check -p storage

task: Update request-record read path to use snapshots
acceptance_criteria: List/detail/search return snapshot names after associated rows are removed
validation_command: perl -e 'alarm shift; exec @ARGV' 60 cargo test -p storage --test provider_request_records

task: Delete user tokens when deleting a user
acceptance_criteria: API user deletion removes that user's API tokens and invalidates auth cache
validation_command: perl -e 'alarm shift; exec @ARGV' 60 cargo test -p user

acceptance_criteria: Relevant Rust checks/tests pass within timeout
validation_command: perl -e 'alarm shift; exec @ARGV' 60 cargo test -p storage --test provider_request_records && perl -e 'alarm shift; exec @ARGV' 60 cargo test -p user
